chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-750 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 06.04.2026 Mr.Abdul Rahim Lakho, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 3 Mr.Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G a/w ASI Aijaz Ali of PS SITE *********** The report of service is received and is taken on record. It appears that this matter was instituted on 05.11.2025, however, thereafter, none has appeared on behalf of the applicant, nor has any intimation been received. A cautionary order was also passed on the last date of hearing. It thus appears that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing this matter. Accordingly, the instant application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
